# seLe4n Handbook

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/generate_doc_navigation.py; edit docs/gitbook/navigation_manifest.json -->

This GitBook is the long-form guide for seLe4n — a production-oriented microkernel written in Lean 4 with machine-checked proofs, targeting Raspberry Pi 5.

## Current project state
- **Version:** 0.31.9 (Lean v4.28.0).
- **Codebase metrics:** ~118k production LoC across 181 files (incl. NEW `SeLe4n/Kernel/Concurrency/Locks/TicketLock.lean` from SM2.B + `rust/sele4n-hal/src/ticket_lock.rs` from SM2.B.16); ~23k test LoC across 31 suites (`tests/TicketLockSuite.lean` from SM2.B with 90+ surface anchors + 35 runtime assertions + 25+ decidable examples); 3,400+ theorem/lemma declarations (zero sorry/axiom). Rust HAL: 613 host unit tests + 1 ignored (`sm1g3_cross_core_kprintln_stress` placeholder) (was 592 pre-SM2.B; +21 SM2.B.16 tests including panic-safety + cross-thread mutex stress + cross-thread FIFO observation) + 94 ABI conformance tests.
- **Latest audit:** [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_COMPREHENSIVE.md) + [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_DEEP_VERIFICATION.md) — pre-1.0 readiness audit. WS-RC R0..R5 LANDED at v0.31.2; R6..R14 absorbed into WS-SM per the SM0.Q.1 absorption mapping in [`AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md §15`](../audits/AUDIT_v0.30.11_WORKSTREAM_PLAN.md). Sub-portfolio plans archived to [`docs/dev_history/audits/`](../dev_history/audits/) per WS-SM SM0.Q.2.
- **Active workstream:** **WS-SM IN FLIGHT** (v0.31.2 → v0.31.3 → v0.31.4 → v0.31.5 → v0.31.6 → v0.31.7 → v0.31.8 → v0.31.9 → v1.0.0). Unified workstream merging WS-RC's remaining R6..R14 phases with the SMP-specific SM-phases (SM0..SM9). **Phase SM0 (Foundations & honesty patches) COMPLETE** at v0.31.3; **SM1 (Rust HAL) CLOSED at v0.31.8** with all nine sub-phases LANDED (SM1.A through SM1.I; 61 total sub-tasks). **Phase SM2 (Verified Lock Primitives) CLOSED post-v0.31.9** with all five sub-phases LANDED: SM2.A (abstract memory model — happens-before partial order foundation), SM2.B (verified TicketLock spec + Rust impl; 6 theorems T-01..T-06), SM2.C (verified RwLock spec + Rust impl; 10 theorems R-01..R-10 with documented FIFO divergence), SM2.D (FFI bridge + integration; SM2.D.7 22-theorem aggregator), and SM2.E (documentation: new SELE4N_SPEC.md §10 normative reference + GitBook chapter 16 + unified refinement-proof methodology hub at `Locks/Refinement.lean` + ARM ARM citation map + decision-rationale and hardware-discipline-limits docstrings). 22 substantive theorems total (4 memory-model + 6 TicketLock + 10 RwLock + 2 refinement) with `lockPrimitives.length = 22` size witness; zero Lean axioms, zero sorries. Plan: [`SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_MULTICORE_COMPLETION_PLAN.md). SM2 sub-plan: [`SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md`](../planning/SMP_VERIFIED_LOCK_PRIMITIVES_PLAN.md). **Items deferred past v1.0.0 with correctness impact: NONE.** Next phases: SM3 (per-object locks consuming SM2 primitives) + SM4..SM9 → closure cut at v1.0.0.
- **Workstream history:** [`docs/WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md`](../WORKSTREAM_HISTORY.md) — complete portfolio record and roadmap.
- **Hardware target:** Raspberry Pi 5 (ARM64).
- **Metrics source of truth:** [`docs/codebase_map.json`](../../docs/codebase_map.json) (`readme_sync` key). Cross-check with `./scripts/report_current_state.py`.
- **Historical records:** Milestone closeouts and prior audits in [`docs/dev_history/`](../dev_history/README.md).

Specification documents:

- **seLe4n project spec:** [`docs/spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md`](../spec/SELE4N_SPEC.md) -- normative scope, milestones, and acceptance criteria.
